positive: A continuous line drawing of a delicate botanical composition, featuring intertwined ferns, olive branches, and stylized wildflowers. The style must be minimalist and elegant, using only fine black ink on a white background. Highly detailed linework, sketch aesthetic, perfect symmetry, suitable for engraving or tattoo design.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, color, shading, watercolor, messy
